description: Create a specific sales region by merging Belgium, Netherlands, and Luxembourg from the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer into a single feature. Set the 'NAME' attribute of the new merged feature to "Benelux Region" and export the result to a new shapefile named 'sales_regions.shp' at /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/. The final layer should contain the "Benelux Region" feature in place of the individual countries.
